response: {"name":"eCLIP-seq library preparation","description":"Enhanced CLIP sequencing (eCLIP-seq) library preparation protocol for mapping RNA-binding protein (RBP)–RNA interactions genome-wide, including UV crosslinking, immunoprecipitation, RNA isolation, adapter ligation, reverse transcription, and paired-end Illumina sequencing.","data_type":"sequencing","raw_data_source":"http://www.encodeproject.org/","steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"RBP–RNA interactions are stabilized by UV crosslinking of cells at 254 nm with 400 mJ/cm² energy.","input_data":"Live cells (e.g., K562, HepG2; 10×10⁶ or 20×10⁶ cells per experiment)","output_data":"UV-crosslinked cells with covalent RBP–RNA complexes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"wavelength":"254 nm","energy":"400 mJ/cm²"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"Crosslinked cells are lysed in iCLIP lysis buffer, and RNA is partially fragmented by limited RNase I digestion.","input_data":"UV-crosslinked cells","output_data":"Cell lysate with fragmented RBP–RNA complexes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"lysis_buffer":"iCLIP lysis buffer","enzyme":"RNase I (Ambion)","digestion":"limited"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"RBP–RNA complexes are immunoprecipitated using a target-specific primary antibody and magnetic beads pre-coupled with secondary antibody, followed by stringent washes.","input_data":"Cell lysate with fragmented RBP–RNA complexes","output_data":"Immunoprecipitated RBP–RNA complexes on magnetic beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"beads":"M-280 Sheep Anti-Rabbit IgG Dynabeads (ThermoFisher Scientific 11204D)","primary_antibody_RBFOX2":"A300-864A lot 002 (Bethyl), 10 ug","primary_antibody_SLBP":"RN045P lot 001 (MBL International), 10 ug","IgG_isotype_control":"02-6102 lot 32013 (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","cell_input_standard":"20×10⁶ cells","cell_input_RNaseI_variation":"10×10⁶ cells and 5 ug antibody"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"RNA fragments on beads are dephosphorylated using FastAP and T4 PNK to prepare RNA 3′ ends for adapter ligation.","input_data":"Immunoprecipitated RBP–RNA complexes on magnetic beads","output_data":"Dephosphorylated RNA fragments on beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzymes":"FastAP (ThermoFisher), T4 PNK (NEB)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"A barcoded RNA adapter is ligated on-bead to the 3′ end of RNA fragments using T4 RNA Ligase in high-concentration PEG8000; multiple replicates or RBPs can be uniquely barcoded and pooled at this step.","input_data":"Dephosphorylated RNA fragments on beads","output_data":"3′-adapter-ligated RNA fragments on beads (barcoded)","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"T4 RNA Ligase (NEB)","additive":"PEG8000 (high concentration)","ligation_efficiency":">90%","ligation_location":"on-bead"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":6,"description":"Samples are resolved by SDS-PAGE on standard protein gels and transferred to nitrocellulose membranes; a region 75 kDa (~150 nt of RNA) above the protein size is excised.","input_data":"3′-adapter-ligated RBP–RNA complexes","output_data":"Nitrocellulose membrane strip containing RBP–RNA complexes of defined size","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"membrane":"nitrocellulose","size_selection":"75 kDa (~150 nt RNA) above protein size"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":7,"description":"Proteinase K treatment of the excised nitrocellulose membrane strip is used to digest the RBP and release the crosslinked RNA.","input_data":"Nitrocellulose membrane strip with RBP–RNA complexes","output_data":"Isolated RNA fragments","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"Proteinase K (NEB)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":8,"description":"Isolated RNA fragments are reverse transcribed into cDNA, and excess oligonucleotides are removed by ExoSAP-IT treatment.","input_data":"Isolated RNA fragments","output_data":"Single-stranded cDNA with excess oligonucleotides removed","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"reverse_transcriptase":"AffinityScript (Agilent)","cleanup_enzyme":"ExoSAP-IT (Affymetrix)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":9,"description":"A second DNA adapter containing a 5′ random-mer (N5 or N10) is ligated to the 3′ end of cDNA fragments using T4 RNA Ligase in the presence of high PEG8000 and DMSO.","input_data":"Single-stranded cDNA fragments","output_data":"3′-adapter-ligated cDNA fragments with random-mer UMI","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"T4 RNA Ligase (NEB)","additive_1":"PEG8000 (high concentration)","additive_2":"DMSO (to decrease inhibition due to secondary structure)","random_mer_options":"N5 or N10 at 5′ end of adapter"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":10,"description":"Adapter-ligated cDNA is cleaned up using Dynabeads MyOne Silane magnetic beads.","input_data":"3′-adapter-ligated cDNA fragments","output_data":"Purified cDNA library","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"cleanup_reagent":"Dynabeads MyOne Silane (ThermoFisher)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":11,"description":"An aliquot of each purified cDNA library is subjected to qPCR to determine the optimal number of PCR amplification cycles.","input_data":"Purified cDNA library aliquot","output_data":"Optimal PCR cycle number","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"method":"qPCR"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":12,"description":"The remaining cDNA library is PCR amplified with Q5 polymerase and size-selected by agarose gel electrophoresis.","input_data":"Purified cDNA library","output_data":"Size-selected, amplified sequencing library","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"polymerase":"Q5 (NEB)","size_selection":"agarose gel electrophoresis"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":13,"description":"Final libraries are sequenced on the Illumina HiSeq 2500 or 4000 platform as paired-end reads (50 bp for N5 adapter, 55 bp for N10 adapter).","input_data":"Size-selected, amplified sequencing
